Description: Verify all required materials and components are available before work begins
Assemble the 6-DOF motion platform base frame and structural supports
Install hydraulic power unit and servo valves and actuator hydraulic lines
Route primary and secondary power distribution harnesses and UPS
Mount aircraft-specific cockpit replica onto the motion platform
Install PFD and ND and MCP and FMC and all flight deck avionics panels
Install LED projectors and collimated mirrors and image generator rack
Install force feedback actuators for yoke and rudder pedals
Full 6-DOF motion platform calibration and motion cueing tuning
End-to-end test of motion and visual and audio and control loading and IOS
Mandatory 72-hour continuous run for reliability qualification
Execute Qualification Test Guide for FAA or EASA Level D certification
Customer acceptance testing and training handover signoff
